The '''Koong Wars''' were a series of conflicts perpetuated and participated in by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] and possibly the [[Moras]] sometime prior to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. A notable veteran of these campaigns was [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]], who was forced into service by the Hutts.

{{Battle-stub}}
